[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11001101 5
1 01001101 4
2 10000011 3
3 11000000 2
4 11001101 5
5 01011101 5
6 10101111 6
7 11001110 5
